segments.text: Topic: Source grounded reporting\n\nA manifest records each source file, checksum, and processing status. The report should cite the segment that supports each claim.
segments.title: Synthetic Seminar Board Notes

segments.text: Topic: Conservative cleanup\n\nCleanup may fix obvious OCR errors and spacing, but it must not invent missing details. If a formula or term is [unclear], keep the marker.
segments.title: Synthetic Seminar Board Notes

segments.text: Topic: Corpus preparation\n\nAfter review, cleaned notes become short corpus segments with stable citations for retrieval and reporting.
segments.title: Synthetic Seminar Board Notes
